column1: Holland Center: Pre-pay $3 via ParkMobile for the Omaha Park Eight garage (13th & Dodge). On-site is $5.
Orpheum Theater: OPPD Energy Plaza garage (1666 Howard St) is $10. Note: This garage is cashless (card or ParkMobile only).

AccessibilityAll venues offer wheelchair-accessible seating, restrooms, and curbside drop-off. Assistive listening devices are available at the house manager's desk. ASL interpretation can be requested through the Box Office (2 weeks' notice preferred).Age GuidelinesMost shows are all-ages at the parent's discretion. However, all guests must have a ticket, including infants. Check specific show pages for age recommendations (e.g., some comedy shows may be 16+ or 18+).Refunds & ExchangeAll sales are final. No refunds or exchanges are provided for weather, travel, or illness. If a show is canceled by the venue, you will be contacted regarding refund options.Late SeatingLatecomers are seated at the discretion of the House Manager at a suitable break in the performance to minimize disruption.Bag PolicyBags larger than 14″ x 14″ x 6″ are generally prohibited. The Orpheum often enforces a "clear bag" policy for specific events (smaller than 7.5" x 5" for non-clear). All bags are subject to search.Cashless VenueAs of 2024/2025, O-PA venues (Holland, Orpheum, Steelhouse) are cashless for concessions. They accept cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
